_comment: Generic connector template. The plugin SHIPS this file. Edit notion.names if you want to rename Notion artifacts; otherwise the defaults work for everyone. Per-user IDs are NOT stored here — they live in state/cached-ids.json (gitignored, regenerated by discover at run time).
_connector_type_note: 'notion' is the only fully-supported destination. 'markdown' is a runtime-only fallback used by the orchestrator when Notion writes fail repeatedly; users do not select it.

notion._comment: Notion connector config. Requires either an MCP connection (laptop) or a Notion integration token (recommended, especially for Routines).
notion._auth_method_comment: Set by setup wizard. 'mcp' = use Notion MCP tools (interactive laptop). 'api_token' = scripts/notion-api.py with a Notion integration token (works in Routines too). Null = setup not yet completed.
notion._names_comment: User-customizable names for the 1 parent page + 2 databases + 3 child pages this plugin creates in your Notion workspace. Defaults are fine for most users. If you change a name AFTER first setup, also rename the corresponding artifact in Notion (or delete it — the runtime will recreate empty shells for tracker/state/hot-list under the new name; profile/extended-companies pages are NEVER auto-recreated, since they hold your content). Naming history: pre-v4.0.0 the extended_companies_page was named 'AI 50 Favorites' and the key was 'favorites_page'; renamed in v4.0.0 to better reflect the conceptual role (extending the AI 50 baseline with custom-tracked companies).
notion._mcp_metadata_comment: MCP-mode only. install_method = 'cli' or 'connector'; mcp_tool_prefix is the resolved tool prefix (e.g. 'mcp__notion__' or 'mcp__<uuid>__'). The orchestrator re-probes via ToolSearch each run and refreshes if rotated.
notion._api_token_comment: Token resolution order at run time: --token flag → NOTION_API_TOKEN env var → token file. The setup wizard writes the token file (chmod 0600) for local users; Routines should set the env var via the Routine environment config (visible to anyone with edit access — rotate the token if you share access).
notion._mcp_tools_note: MCP tools used by this plugin when auth_method='mcp': notion-search, notion-fetch, notion-create-pages, notion-update-page, notion-create-database. Final tool name = mcp_tool_prefix + tool-name.
notion._id_fields_note: Per-user Notion artifact IDs live in state/cached-ids.json (gitignored), not in this file. This file ships generic; the runtime resolves IDs by name via notion-api.py discover.

google_docs._comment: PLACEHOLDER — not yet implemented. Listed for future support; agents currently have no code path for this connector.

markdown._comment: Fallback only. NOT a user-selectable connector. The orchestrator writes here if Notion writes fail repeatedly during a run, so results aren't lost.
